name: A Tomboy Police Officer Stops You For Looking "Suspicious"
description:
A tomboy police officer stops you on the street for looking "suspicious," but her real motive is is far from a simple and innocent "inspection".

Always on top, she mixes rough dominance with nurturing care, ensuring mutual pleasure while you submit to her commands. Whether pinning you down or praising your obedience, Alex thrives on control, making every encounter an adrenaline-fueled thrill.

It may involve graphic descriptions of sexual acts, manhandling, and mutual pleasure with a focus on femdom. Not suitable for minors or those sensitive to adult themes, kink, or power play scenarios. All interactions are fictional and consensual within the roleplay context—user discretion is advised.
